title: Remove main/master from default blocked target branches
body:
## Summary
- Only `release/*` branches are now blocked from auto-approve by default
- Removes `main` and `master` from the default `blocked_target_branches` list — repos can still add them in their config if needed
- Updates schema defaults, YAML defaults, docs, dashboard UI, and tests

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify PRs targeting `main`/`master` are no longer flagged as "Target branch is in blocked list"
- [ ] Verify PRs targeting `release/*` branches still trigger human review

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
